variants.title: Filtrec RHK350M10V Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHK350M10V. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHK350M10V provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Seal: Viton
